settings.title: Emergency Service
settings.description: Burst pipes, power outages, gas leaks — call our 24/7 line immediately. Average response time: 60 minutes.

settings.title: Scheduled Service
settings.description: Book online or call during business hours for planned repairs, installations, and maintenance work.

settings.title: Free Estimate
settings.description: Request a no-obligation quote for your project. We'll diagnose the issue and give you upfront pricing.

settings.question: What should I do in a plumbing emergency?
settings.answer: First, shut off the water supply at the main valve (usually near the water meter or where the line enters your home). Then call us immediately at (555) 847-3200. If there's standing water near electrical outlets, do not enter the area.

settings.question: How much does a typical repair cost?
settings.answer: Costs vary by job. A drain cleaning typically runs $150–$350. A water heater replacement runs $1,200–$3,500. Panel upgrades range from $1,800–$4,000. We always provide an upfront price before starting work.

settings.question: Do I need to be home during the service?
settings.answer: For most jobs, yes — we need access to the work area and may need to discuss options with you. For pre-authorized work (like a scheduled water heater swap), we can coordinate access with you in advance.

settings.question: What payment methods do you accept?
settings.answer: We accept cash, check, and all major credit cards. Payment is due upon completion. For larger projects ($5,000+), we offer financing through a third-party partner with approved credit.
